name: streamdock-plugin-builder
description: Build StreamDock (Mirabox Stream Dock) plugins from a plain-text description: manifest.json, the Node.js plugin backend, keypad/dial action handlers, and the Property Inspector settings UI.

interface.shortDescription: Build StreamDock plugins from a text description
interface.longDescription: An agent skill that turns a plain-text feature description into a complete, installable StreamDock plugin: manifest.json, the Node.js backend, keypad/dial action handlers, the Property Inspector UI, language files, and the build/install step.
